---
title: "Exercise 2D: Portfolio Consolidation"
subtitle: "MGMT 675: Generative AI for Finance"
format:
  pdf:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{xcolor}
        \PassOptionsToPackage{colorlinks=true,urlcolor=blue,linkcolor=blue}{hyperref}
---

Download [portfolio-consolidation.zip](../files/portfolio-consolidation.zip) and extract the files into a folder. You will have holdings data from three brokerages in different formats (two Excel workbooks and one CSV).

In Claude Code, ask Claude to:

1. Merge all equity holdings into a single consolidated view with standardized columns
2. Resolve inconsistencies between ticker symbols and full company names
3. Sum shares for positions that appear in multiple accounts
4. Produce a summary showing total portfolio value, top five holdings by market value, and asset allocation between equities and bonds

Save the result as `consolidated.xlsx`.

\bigskip
\noindent\textbf{Deliverables.}

- Consolidated workbook (`2D-Consolidated.xlsx`)
- Screenshot of Claude conversation (`2D-Screenshot.png`)
